mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (phone, email, password_hash, nickname, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, email, password_hash, nickname, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, phone, email, password_hash, nickname, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, phone, email, password_hash, nickname, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
